title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
